behavior_summary: Defines logic for a small hovering item (MINIAIR) that, when activated (U8P_MINIAIR::use) or examined (look), runs short visual and positional animations to produce a subtle hovering/mini-air effect.

U8P_MINIAIR::use sets item info/exclusion state for processing, computes a small initial phase/index, then spawns two short scripts: a frame animation driver (U8P_MINIAIR::00E9) and a movement/hover driver (U8P_MINIAIR::0129).
U8P_MINIAIR::look performs the same info/exclusion setup and only spawns the frame animation (U8P_MINIAIR::00E9).
U8P_MINIAIR::00E9 increments a per-tick frame counter and calls Item::setFrame to update visuals; behavior is clamped/altered when the global levitateAvatar flag is set.

U8P_MINIAIR::0129 is a repeating phase/step machine that computes small X/Y offsets from a phase/index, reads the item's base X/Y/Z via Item::getX/Y/Z, and calls Item::move to reposition the item each step, producing hover motion. If levitateAvatar is set, movement is suppressed/exited.
notable_control_flow: U8P_MINIAIR::use immediately spawns two short-lived processes (frame animator and movement driver) and then returns; spawn return values are captured but not used to affect logic.
Both helper scripts suspend between ticks (tick-driven/suspend-resume behavior) to animate over several frames/steps rather than completing in one frame.
Global guard levitateAvatar is checked by both helpers: it short-circuits movement (0129 exits) and alters frame progression (00E9 clamps frames).

Movement driver (0129) transforms an initial phase parameter by multiplying by 6 to form an internal index used by a small step table/state machine that cycles offsets and calls Item::move each iteration.
open_questions: Exact numeric frame indices and step timing used by U8P_MINIAIR::00E9 (the disassembly shows increments and ceilings but not the meaning of each frame).
Precise contents of the phase-to-offset table used by U8P_MINIAIR::0129 (how the multiplied index maps to X/Y components).
Meaning and effect of the byte parameter passed through Item::move (propagated from the original spawn call) — whether it encodes movement flags or a move speed.
Whether the info/exclusion flags set by U8P_MINIAIR::use/look carry gameplay consequences beyond preventing reprocessing (exact info ID semantics not recorded here).

main_function.name: U8P_MINIAIR::use
main_function.purpose: Handle activation/U8P_MINIAIR::use of the MINIAIR item: prepare the item (set info/exclude flags), compute a small initial phase/index, spawn a short frame animation process (U8P_MINIAIR::00E9) and a movement/hover process (U8P_MINIAIR::0129) that together produce a brief visual hover animation, then return.
entry_conditions: Event: U8P_MINIAIR::use / activate the MINIAIR object (player or script invokes the item's U8P_MINIAIR::use event)

function_map.name: U8P_MINIAIR::use
function_map.role: Entry handler for item activation: sets up item state and spawns helper animation/movement scripts.

function_map.name: U8P_MINIAIR::look
function_map.role: Handler for examination/look: sets item info/exclusion and spawns the visual frame animation (U8P_MINIAIR::00E9) without starting movement.

function_map.name: U8P_MINIAIR::00E9
function_map.role: Ticked frame-animation driver: increments frame counter each tick and calls Item::setFrame; behavior altered by levitateAvatar.

function_map.name: U8P_MINIAIR::0129
function_map.role: Position/movement/hover driver: uses an initial phase/index to run a small step machine that computes offsets and calls Item::move repeatedly to produce hover motion; exits if levitateAvatar is set.

function_map.name: Item::setFrame
function_map.role: Engine API to set the visual frame/shape index of the item (called by U8P_MINIAIR::00E9).

function_map.name: Item::getX
function_map.role: Engine API to read the item's X coordinate (called by U8P_MINIAIR::0129).

function_map.name: Item::getY
function_map.role: Engine API to read the item's Y coordinate (called by U8P_MINIAIR::0129).

function_map.name: Item::getZ
function_map.role: Engine API to read the item's Z coordinate (used in vertical offset calculation inside U8P_MINIAIR::0129).

function_map.name: Item::move
function_map.role: Engine API to move/reposition the item to computed X/Y coordinates (called repeatedly by U8P_MINIAIR::0129).

internal_calls.purpose: Spawn a short frame-animation process to drive Item::setFrame updates after activation.
Spawn a movement/hover process that will reposition the item over several ticks using a computed initial phase/index.
Spawn the same short frame-animation process when the item is examined/looked-at.

external_calls.purpose: Update the displayed frame/shape index of the item according to the running frame counter.
Read base X coordinate to compute target X for move operations.
Read base Y coordinate to compute target Y for move operations.
Read base Z coordinate used in vertical offset calculation for movement.
Reposition the item each step to computed coordinates to produce hovering effect; a byte parameter from the original spawn is forwarded into this call.

reads.name: levitateAvatar
reads.likely_effect: When set, the frame-animation sequence in U8P_MINIAIR::00E9 is clamped/shortened and the movement driver U8P_MINIAIR::0129 suppresses/exits movement (global guard preventing hover animation).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Defines logic for a small hovering item (MINIAIR) that, when activated (U8P_MINIAIR::use) or examined (look), runs short visual and positional animations to produce a subtle hovering/mini-air effect.
